description: A junior developer attempted to inject a custom nginx.conf into the 'nginx-gateway' deployment in the 'edge-routing' namespace, but the deployment is currently in a CrashLoopBackOff state. A specification document is located at /home/ga/Desktop/gateway_spec.md. Diagnose and resolve the CrashLoopBackOff, ensuring the custom configuration is mounted correctly without obscuring default system files, securely mount the required TLS certificates, and enforce ConfigMap immutability. Login to Rancher at https://localhost with credentials admin / Admin12345678!
